implementation_steps.action: 生成迁移
implementation_steps.verify_command: cd Gentle && dotnet ef migrations add RemoveRoomAreaAndRoomType --project Gentle.Database.Migrations --startup-project Gentle.Web.Entry

implementation_steps.code_hint: 确认 Up 方法包含 DropColumn("Area", "Rooms") 和 DropColumn("RoomType", "Rooms")

implementation_steps.action: 应用迁移
implementation_steps.verify_command: cd Gentle && dotnet ef database update --project Gentle.Database.Migrations --startup-project Gentle.Web.Entry
